timeline.title: The Journey
timeline.subtitle: The story of an idea becoming a studio.

m1.title: The Beginning
m1.description: Founder Kamer Can Izvermez started his music journey by writing songs. He began learning marketing, design and digital strategy to distribute and promote his music.

m2.title: Versatile Experience
m2.description: Magazine editing, call center, social media management at sports agencies -- while working across different sectors, he never stopped making music and releasing songs. During this time, he learned the nuances of marketing, brand management and digital content production in the field.

m3.title: AI Transformation
m3.description: Kamer, who integrated AI tools into his workflows from the very beginning, recognized early the potential of artificial intelligence to transform the creative industry. He began building automation and AI agent systems.

m4.title: Echo Bazaar
m4.description: The Kai's first major project: an AI music channel was launched. It became a rising brand on YouTube.

m5.title: 20 Million+ Streams
m5.description: Echo Bazaar surpassed 20 million streams. The KIM? album was featured on Spotify's Discover playlist. 72+ AI agent systems were built, operations were automated.

m6.title: The Kai
m6.description: The company was officially founded. thekai.co went live. A studio merging music, technology and creativity was born.

m7.title: Murmur
m7.description: The AI audiobook publishing project was launched. Continuing to build new worlds.

about.title: About The Kai
about.subtitle: A studio building worlds at the intersection of music, technology and creativity.
about.founderBio: Musician, songwriter, composer, AI entrepreneur. From writing songs to building AI agent systems — 15 years of creative journey.
about.paragraph1: The Kai is a creative studio that merges music and technology. From AI music production to software development, from content creation to automation systems — we offer a wide range of services.
about.paragraph2: With the Echo Bazaar project, we surpassed 20 million streams in the AI music space. With MURMUR, we're bringing classic literature back to life through AI narration. We manage our own operations with over 72 AI agents.
about.paragraph3: We bring the same technology and vision to your project. Whether you're building an AI agent system, producing content, or developing a web app — The Kai approaches every project with the same passion.
about.quote: Every project is a world. Every world is a story. And every story grows with technology.

creativity.title: Creativity
